stories.title: Building a safe, effective sandbox to enable Codex on Windows
stories.summary: Learn how OpenAI built a secure sandbox for Codex on Windows, enabling safe, efficient coding agents with controlled file access and network restrictions.

stories.title: Our response to the TanStack npm supply chain attack
stories.summary: OpenAI details its response to the TanStack “Mini Shai-Hulud” supply chain attack, outlines protections taken to secure systems and signing certificates, and explains why macOS users must update OpenAI apps by June 12, 2026. stories.summary: Explore how AlphaEvolve's Gemini-powered algorithms are driving impact across business, infrastructure, and science.

stories.summary: Many roboticists (and at least one robotics journalist) have been seduced by the dream of a robot butler. stories.title: Video Friday: AI Gives Robot Hands Humanlike Dexterity
stories.summary: Video Friday is your weekly selection of awesome robotics videos, collected by your friends at IEEE Spectrum robotics. We also post a weekly calendar of upcoming robotics events for the next few months. Please send us your events for inclusion. ICRA 2026 : 1–5 June 2026, VIENNA RSS 2026 : 13–17 July

stories.title: Bridging the gap: Profitability meets sustainability through physical AI
stories.summary: Join Ranpak’s Omar Asali at the Robotics Summit to learn how physical AI scales sustainable, profitable warehouse operations. The post Bridging the gap: Profitability meets sustainability through physical AI appeared first on The Robot Report .

stories.title: Alva Industries to bring its frameless motor technology to the Robotics Summit
stories.summary: At the show, Alva will show SlimTorq, one of the thinnest and lightest frameless motors on the market. The post Alva Industries to bring its frameless motor technology to the Robotics Summit appeared first on The Robot Report .

stories.title: Claude Code costs up to $200 a month. Goose does the same thing for free.

stories.title: AGI Is Not Multimodal
stories.summary: "In projecting language back as the model for thought, we lose sight of the tacit embodied understanding that undergirds our intelligence." –Terry Winograd The recent successes of generative AI models have convinced some that AGI is imminent.
